chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Musa Ibn Umar Ibn Bazi

text: و ما كان فيه عن موسى بن عمر بن بزيع فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رحمه اللّه- عن علي بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن موسى بن عمر بن بزيع‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Musa ibn Umar ibn Bazi has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Musa ibn Umar ibn Bazi.
